name: Bud's Bus Svc
employees_est: 12-56 (sources vary; D&B ~12 at location, payroll filings ~56)
districts_or_customers: Independent School District 518 (Worthington, MN) - primary district contract; longstanding incumbent.
recent_news: 2024 incident: 3-year-old preschool student left on Bud's bus for ~1hr 15min after PM route; parents pursued legal action vs Bud's and ISD 518. No M&A reported. Active Facebook & Chamber member.
fit_notes: 55-year-old family-run Worthington MN incumbent serving ISD 518; Fritz family ownership and small footprint signal high succession potential, though 2024 child-left-on-bus incident is a diligence flag. Small but sticky single-district contract - viable bolt-on if Summit has MN ambitions.
